RepurpOS

Asthma

Disease intelligence for Asthma: 113 alterations and 642 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

US DALYs1.44MWHO GHE 2021 · all ages
Global DALYs21.99MWHO GHE 2021 · worldwide
US mortality3,646 deaths/yrWHO GHE 2021
Global mortality425.7K deaths/yrWHO GHE 2021 · worldwide
NIH funding$242MFY2025 · RCDC estimate
Funding levelUnderfunded
Spontaneous remission26% of childhood-onset asthma in clinical remission by adulthood; <20% adult-onset achieves sustained remission; 65%…

Primary barrierbiological (severe phenotype) + practice (AIT underutilized)

Disease overview

Sources: Open Targets, HPO, ClinicalTrials.gov, DGIdb, ChEMBL, PubMed MeSH, PubMed Literature, PubMed NP · Pipeline phase 7 · Updated 2026-07-05

Remission & chronicity

Spontaneous remission
26% of childhood-onset asthma in clinical remission by adulthood; <20% adult-onset achieves sustained remission; 65% long-term remission in mild-moderate vs 16% in severe
Best-intervention remission
Biologics (anti-IL-5, anti-IL-4/13, anti-IgE) achieve near-zero exacerbation rates in eligible severe patients; allergen immunotherapy (AIT) achieves sustained drug-free remission in allergic asthma in ~30-40% of treated patients
Drug-free remission
—
Relapse after remission
—
Chronicity
—
Gap size
Moderate; highly severity-dependent; large practice gap for AIT
Primary barrier
biological (severe phenotype) + practice (AIT underutilized)
Barrier detail: Allergen immunotherapy is the only disease-modifying treatment for allergic asthma and is underused relative to guidelines; biological phenotyping (T2-high vs T2-low) drives outcomes more than treatment intensity alone

Last SoC change: 2022 — GINA guidelines introduced 'anti-inflammatory reliever' strategy (ICS-formoterol as reliever replacing SABA monotherapy); biologics formally endorsed as step 5 since ~2016; ICS as first-line unchanged since 1990s

Remission data layers: disease_db_100 · source-locked manual data · confidence: high

Related: Biomarker atlas · Intervention atlas

Identifiers: MONDO: MONDO:0004979 · MESH: D001249 · UMLS_CUI: C0004096

Therapeutics

Direct disease associations, biomarker-linked drugs, OSMF narrative-review natural agents, merged ranking, and clinical trial / literature evidence (top agents)

DrugTypePhaseEvidence ScoreTrials & literatureSourcesLinks
ALBUTEROL SULFATE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 18 Trial pubs 16 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT02126839 — A Chronic-Dose Safety and Efficacy Study of Albuterol Multi-Dose Dry Powder Inhaler in Pediatric Asthmatics (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT02479412 — A Multiple Dosing (14 Days) Study to Assess Efficacy and Safety of Three Dose Levels of AZD7594, Given Once Daily by Inhalation, in Patients With Mild to Moderate Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT00529529 — Safety of Indacaterol in Patients (≥ 12 Years) With Moderate to Severe Persistent Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00667407 — Efficacy and Safety of Levalbuterol Versus Racemic Albuterol in Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00200967 — Asthma Clinical Research Network (ACRN) Trial - Long-Acting Beta Agonist Response by Genotype (LARGE) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00096616 — Combivent® CFC Metered Dose Inhaler (MDI) in Moderate to Severe Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT01302587 — A Study to Evaluate the Integrated Dose Counter on an Albuterol Hydrofluoroalkane (HFA) Metered Dose Inhaler (MDI) (COMPLETED)
  • NCT02794519 — A Phase 2a Study to Evaluate the Effects of Sirukumab in Subjects With Severe Poorly Controlled Asthma (WITHDRAWN) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Dose-Ranging and Cumulative Dose Studies of Albuterol Sulfate MDI in Co-Suspension Delivery™ Technology (AS MDI; PT007) in Patients with Asthma: the ASPEN and ANTORA Trials (Clinical drug investigation, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of heliox- and air-driven nebulized bronchodilator therapy on lung function in patients with asthma (Lung, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Prospective, open-label assessment of albuterol sulfate hydrofluoroalkane metered-dose inhaler with new integrated dose counter (Allergy and asthma proceedings, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication The effect of heliox-driven bronchodilator aerosol therapy on pulmonary function tests in patients with asthma (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2002)
  • Clinical trial publication Long-acting beta2-agonist monotherapy vs continued therapy with inhaled corticosteroids in patients with persistent asthma: a randomized controlled trial (JAMA, 2001)
  • Randomized controlled trial Clinical comparability of ventolin formulated with hydrofluoroalkane or conventional chlorofluorocarbon propellants in children with asthma (Archives of pediatrics & adolescent medicine, 2000)

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

 Open Targets, ChEMBL ChEMBL Open Targets
AMINOPHYLLINE Biologic Approved Strong 100
3 trials 11 Cochrane 7 Meta-analysis 156 Trial pubs 98 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00442338 — Study of MK-0476 in Adult Patients With Acute Asthma (0476-334) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT03296579 — Non-invasive Ventilation vs. Standard Therapy for Children Hospitalized With an Acute Exacerbation of Asthma (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT02270827 — A Pilot Study Into Health Pre and Post Treatment With Intravenous Aminophylline and Hydrocortisone in Severe Asthmatics (TERMINATED)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Use of intravenous aminophylline in addition to the standard first-line treatment in children and adolescents with an acute asthma exacerbation: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials (Archives of disease in childhood, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Interventions for escalation of therapy for acute exacerbations of asthma in children: an overview of Cochrane Reviews (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Guideline on management of the acute asthma attack in children by Italian Society of Pediatrics (Italian journal of pediatrics, 2018)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy and side effects of intravenous theophylline in acute asthma: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Drug design, development and therapy, 2018)
  • Cochrane review Intravenous beta(2)-agonists versus intravenous aminophylline for acute asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2012)
  • Meta-analysis Intravenous Bronchodilators in Pediatric Critical Asthma: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Pediatric pulmonology, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Second-line treatment option for children aged 18 years and under with an acute severe asthma exacerbation: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials (Archives of disease in childhood, 2025)
  • Systematic review Use of ketamine in patients with refractory severe asthma exacerbations: systematic review of prospective studies (European journal of clinical pharmacology, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Magnesium sulfate vs aminophylline as a second line of treatment in children with severe acute asthma. Randomized clinical trial (Andes pediatrica : revista Chilena de pediatria, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Randomised comparison of intravenous magnesium sulphate, terbutaline and aminophylline for children with acute severe asthma (Acta paediatrica (Oslo, Norway : 1992), 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication [Clinical efficacies of inhaled corticosteroids plus theophylline in the treatment of bronchial asthma] (Zhonghua yi xue za zhi, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication The efficacy and tolerability of intravenous montelukast in acute asthma exacerbations in Japanese patients (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2012)

BECLOMETHASONE DIPROPIONATE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 18 Cochrane 21 Meta-analysis 541 Trial pubs 388 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT04886999 — Study in Adult Patients With Moderate to Severe Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01345916 — Efficacy of CHF1535 Via NEXT DPI Versus pMDI and BDP DPI100µg on PeakExpiratoryFlow in Asthmatic Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00200967 — Asthma Clinical Research Network (ACRN) Trial - Long-Acting Beta Agonist Response by Genotype (LARGE) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00094016 — Evaluation of Two Doses of QVAR by Breath Operated and Metered Dose Inhalers in Asthmatic Children (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01520688 — Effect of Flovent Discus vs QVAR vs Pulmicort Flexhaler on Short Term Growth (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01141439 — Real-world Effectiveness and Cost-effectiveness of Leading Inhaled Corticosteroids in Asthma Management (COMPLETED)
  • NCT01287351 — Real-world Effectiveness and Cost-effectiveness of Qvar Versus FP, a US Study (COMPLETED)
  • NCT00497237 — Clinical Trial of the Efficacy and Safety of Beclomethasone Dipropionate Plus Formoterol vs Fluticasone Propionate Plus Salmeterol in the 6 Months Step Down Treatment of Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Inhaled corticosteroids in children with persistent asthma: effects on growth (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2014)
  • Cochrane review Omalizumab for asthma in adults and children (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2014)
  • Cochrane review Increased versus stable doses of inhaled corticosteroids for exacerbations of chronic asthma in adults and children (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2010)
  • Cochrane review Increased versus stable doses of inhaled corticosteroids for exacerbations of chronic asthma in adults and children (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2010)
  • Cochrane review Fluticasone versus beclomethasone or budesonide for chronic asthma in adults and children (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2007)
  • Meta-analysis Adrenal suppression by inhaled corticosteroids in patients with asthma: A systematic review and quantitative analysis (Allergy and asthma proceedings, 2016)
  • Systematic review Efficacy and safety of inhaled corticosteroids relative to fluticasone propionate: a systematic review of randomized controlled trials in asthma (Expert review of respiratory medicine, 2017)
  • Systematic review Principal findings of systematic reviews for chronic treatment in childhood asthma (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2015)
  • Clinical trial publication [Efficacy and safety of inhaled salbutamol sulfate combined with beclomethasone dipropionate in children with bronchial asthma: a randomized controlled study] (Zhongguo dang dai er ke za zhi = Chinese journal of contemporary pediatrics, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Improved lung function with beclomethasone/formoterol versus beclomethasone alone in asthma: the FORCE2 study (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Evaluating the impact of changing inhaler color on perception of symptoms and disease burden in patients with asthma: the FEEL study (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Comparison of extrafine beclomethasone dipropionate/formoterol fumarate dry powder inhaler and pressurized metered-dose inhaler in Chinese patients with asthma: the FORTUNE study (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2024)

BUDESONIDE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 57 Cochrane 66 Meta-analysis 910 Trial pubs 793 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT04609904 — Study to Assess PT010 in Adult and Adolescent Participants With Inadequately Controlled Asthma (LOGOS) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00235911 — Symbicort Single Inhaler Therapy for Asthma in a General Practice Setting (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT03788057 — Inflammatory Indices in Predicting the Failure of Inhaled Corticosteroids Reduction in Young Participants With Asthma (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01520688 — Effect of Flovent Discus vs QVAR vs Pulmicort Flexhaler on Short Term Growth (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01444430 — A 6 Month Safety Study Comparing Symbicort With Inhaled Corticosteroid Only in Asthmatic Adults and Adolescents (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT06080945 — Tailored Pharmacist-led Intervention to Improve Adherence to Budesonide (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT00641446 — Varicella Vaccination With Pulmicort (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT03319043 — Observation of Cough Variant Asthma Treated in Combination of Chanqin Granules. (UNKNOWN) PHASE1, PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Adverse events of inhaled corticosteroids in adult patients with asthma or chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: pairwise, network and dose-response meta-analyses (BMJ evidence-based medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety profile of doxofylline in asthma: a meta-analysis (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Single maintenance and reliever therapy in treatment of asthma exacerbations (Annals of allergy, asthma & immunology : official publication of the American College of Allergy, Asthma, & Immunology, 2022)
  • Cochrane review A review of the efficacy and safety of fluticasone propionate/formoterol fixed-dose combination (Expert review of respiratory medicine, 2022)
  • Cochrane review Combination fixed-dose β agonist and steroid inhaler as required for adults or children with mild asthma: a Cochrane systematic review (BMJ evidence-based medicine, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Effect of aerosol inhalation of budesonide on respiratory symptoms and inflammatory factors in patients with asthma: a meta-analysis (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Clinical efficacy of montelukast sodium combination therapy for cough variant asthma in children: A meta-analysis (Pediatric pulmonology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Effect of Montelukast Combined with Budesonide on Inflammatory Response and Pulmonary Function in Children with Cough Variant Asthma: A Meta-analysis (Journal of the College of Physicians and Surgeons--Pakistan : JCPSP, 2023)
  • Systematic review [IS AS NEEDED THERAPY WITH AN INHALED BUDESONIDE/FORMOTEROL COMBINATION ONLY WHEN SYMPTOMATIC AS AN OPTION IN THE MANAGEMENT OF PATIENTS WITH MILD ASTHMA?] (Arerugi = [Allergy], 2025)
  • Systematic review Quantitative comparison of different inhaled corticosteroids in the treatment of asthma in children (Pediatric research, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Budesonide-glycopyrronium-formoterol fumarate dihydrate in uncontrolled asthma (KALOS and LOGOS): twin multicentre, double-blind, double-dummy, parallel-group, randomised, phase 3 trials (The Lancet. Respiratory medicine, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Analysis of risk factors for recurrence in children with asthmatic bronchopneumonia during remission and discussion on the therapeutic effect of diprophylline combined with budesonide (Pakistan journal of pharmaceutical sciences, 2026)

CICLESONIDE Small molecule Approved Strong 100

View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00163371 — Effects of Inhaled Ciclesonide Versus Fluticasone Propionate Versus Placebo on Lower Leg Growth in Prepubertal Children With Mild Persistent Asthma (6 to 12 y) (BY9010/M1-208) (COMPLETED) PHASE3

  • NCT03839433 — The Mannitol-Asthma-Ciclesonide-Study (COMPLETED) PHASE4

  • NCT00525772 — Effect of Ciclesonide on Exercise Induced Bronchoconstriction (COMPLETED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Inhaled ciclesonide does not affect production of antibodies or elimination of virus in patients with COVID-19: Subanalysis of a multicenter, open-label randomized trial (Drug discoveries & therapeutics, 2023)

  • Clinical trial publication [Effect of modified painless wheat-grain blistering moxibustion on cough variant asthma of wind cold attacking the lung: a randomized controlled trial] (Zhongguo zhen jiu = Chinese acupuncture & moxibustion, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of budesonide combined with montelukast sodium on pulmonary function parameters and immunoglobulin levels in children with bronchial asthma (Allergologia et immunopathologia, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy of montelukast sodium chewable tablets combined with inhaled budesonide in treating pediatric asthma and its effect on inflammatory factors (Die Pharmazie, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication [Clinical effect of fluticasone propionate, montelukast sodium and ketotifen in treatment of cough variant asthma in children] (Zhongguo dang dai er ke za zhi = Chinese journal of contemporary pediatrics, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication [Micro-invasive embedding combined with montelukast sodium for children cough variant asthma:a randomized controlled trial] (Zhongguo zhen jiu = Chinese acupuncture & moxibustion, 2017)

View evidence

  • NCT05035862 — Mechanisms of Interferon Gamma-primed Mesenchymal Stromal Cells (MSCs) for Moderate-to-severe Persistent Asthma (TERMINATED) PHASE1
  • NCT06833814 — DOSE Trial: Optimal Dose of Oral Corticosteroids to Treat Asthma Exacerbations (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) PHASE4
  • NCT03133897 — Dexamethasone Versus Prednisone for Asthma Treatment in the Pediatric Inpatient Population; a Feasibility Study (TERMINATED) PHASE3
  • NCT00377364 — Acetaminophen (Tylenol) for Mood and Memory Changes Associated With Corticosteroid Therapy (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT03470311 — Benralizumab in Patients With Inadequate Response to Anti-IL5 Monoclonal Antibody Therapies (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01615874 — Study of the Effect of Mometasone Furoate/Formoterol (MF/F), Montelukast and Beclomethasone Dipropionate (BDP) on Plasma Cortisol Levels of Children 5-11 Years Old With Persistent Asthma (P05574) (WITHDRAWN) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review The efficacy of dexamethasone compared to prednisone/prednisolone for the management of pediatric patients with acute exacerbation of asthma: a systematic review and meta-analysis (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Dexamethasone versus prednisone/prednisolone in the management of pediatric patients with acute asthmatic exacerbations: a systematic review and meta-analysis (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2023)
  • Cochrane review Safety of corticosteroids in young children with acute respiratory conditions: a systematic review and meta-analysis (BMJ open, 2019)
  • Cochrane review Intramuscular versus oral corticosteroids to reduce relapses following discharge from the emergency department for acute asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2018)
  • Cochrane review Effects of prednisone on eosinophilic bronchitis in asthma: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Jornal brasileiro de pneumologia : publicacao oficial da Sociedade Brasileira de Pneumologia e Tisilogia, 2014)
  • Meta-analysis Dexamethasone Versus Prednisone or Prednisolone for Acute Pediatric Asthma Exacerbations in the Emergency Department: A Meta-Analysis (Pediatric emergency care, 2021)
  • Meta-analysis Oral steroid-sparing effect of high-dose inhaled corticosteroids in asthma (The European respiratory journal, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Oral corticosteroid reduction and discontinuation in adults with corticosteroid-dependent, severe, uncontrolled asthma treated with tezepelumab (WAYFINDER): a multicentre, single-arm, phase 3b trial (The Lancet. Respiratory medicine, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Modification of asthma treatment efficacy by healthcare access: A reanalysis of AsthmaNet Step-Up Yellow Zone Inhaled Corticosteroids to Prevent Exacerbations (STICS) clinical trial (Respiratory medicine, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication The Glucocorticoid Toxicity Index-Metabolic Domains, an abridged version of the Glucocorticoid Toxicity Index: post-hoc analysis of data from the ADVOCATE trial (The Lancet. Rheumatology, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication As-Needed Use of Short-Acting β(2)-Agonists Alone Versus As-Needed Use of Short-Acting β(2)-Agonists Plus Inhaled Corticosteroids in Pediatric Patients With Mild Intermittent (Step 1) Asthma: A Cost-Effectiveness Analysis (The journal of allergy and clinical immunology. In practice, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Patient Advocates for Low-Income Adults with Moderate to Severe Asthma: A Randomized Clinical Trial (The journal of allergy and clinical immunology. In practice, 2020)

8 trials 2 Cochrane 4 Meta-analysis 44 Trial pubs 41 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT02388373 — A Guideline Approach to Therapy Step-down Utilising Flutiform Change and Step-down (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00529529 — Safety of Indacaterol in Patients (≥ 12 Years) With Moderate to Severe Persistent Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00200967 — Asthma Clinical Research Network (ACRN) Trial - Long-Acting Beta Agonist Response by Genotype (LARGE) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT05459194 — Efficacy and Safety Study of Fluticasone/Salmeterol Administered With Elpenhaler (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00364442 — Repeat Dose Study of Fluticasone Propionate/Salmeterol Versus Fluticasone Propionate + Salmeterol In Asthmatics (COMPLETED) PHASE1
  • NCT02251379 — Environmental Control as Add-on Therapy in Childhood Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT00169546 — Study In Airway Physiology In Children SERETIDE DISKUS ® Inhlaer and FLIXOTIDE® Inhaler Are Trademarks of GSK Group of Companies. (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00452348 — A 12-Month Study Comparing Fluticasone Propionate/Salmeterol (ADVAIR) DISKUS Combination Product 250/50mcg Twice Daily To Fluticasone Propionate (FLOVENT) DISKUS 250 mcg Twice Daily In Symptomatic Patients With Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Inhaled long acting beta agonists for stable chronic asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2003)
  • Cochrane review Regular treatment with long acting beta agonists versus daily regular treatment with short acting beta agonists in adults and children with stable asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2002)
  • Meta-analysis COST-effectiveness of salmeterol/fluticasone propionate combination (Advair(®)) in uncontrolled asthma in Canada (Respiratory medicine, 2014)
  • Meta-analysis Cost-effectiveness of salmeterol xinafoate/fluticasone propionate combination inhaler in chronic asthma (Current medical research and opinion, 2007)
  • Meta-analysis Comparison of inhaled salmeterol and oral zafirlukast in asthmatic patients using concomitant inhaled corticosteroids (MedGenMed : Medscape general medicine, 2001)
  • Systematic review Inhaled corticosteroids or long-acting beta-agonists alone or in fixed-dose combinations in asthma treatment: a systematic review of fluticasone/budesonide and formoterol/salmeterol (Clinical therapeutics, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Once-daily mometasone plus indacaterol versus mometasone or twice-daily fluticasone plus salmeterol in patients with inadequately controlled asthma (PALLADIUM): a randomised, double-blind, triple-dummy, controlled phase 3 study (The Lancet. Respiratory medicine, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication The efficacy and safety of fluticasone/salmeterol compared to fluticasone in children younger than four years of age (Pediatric allergy and immunology : official publication of the European Society of Pediatric Allergy and Immunology, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Video education versus face-to-face education on inhaler technique for patients with well-controlled or partly-controlled asthma: A phase IV, open-label, non-inferiority, multicenter, randomized, controlled trial (PloS one, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacokinetic analysis of inhaled salmeterol in asthma patients: Evidence from two dry powder inhalers (Biopharmaceutics & drug disposition, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication A Randomized Pragmatic Trial of Changing to and Stepping Down Fluticasone/Formoterol in Asthma (The journal of allergy and clinical immunology. In practice, 2017)
  • Randomized controlled trial Clinical Bioequivalence of OT329 SOLIS and ADVAIR DISKUS in Adults with Asthma (Annals of the American Thoracic Society, 2017)

  • Clinical trial publication Tiotropium bromide step-up therapy for adults with uncontrolled asthma (The New England journal of medicine, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Glycopyrrolate causes prolonged bronchoprotection and bronchodilatation in patients with asthma (Chest, 2005)

DrugTypePhaseEvidence ScoreTrials & literatureSourcesLinks
ALBUTEROL SULFATE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 18 Trial pubs 16 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT02126839 — A Chronic-Dose Safety and Efficacy Study of Albuterol Multi-Dose Dry Powder Inhaler in Pediatric Asthmatics (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT02479412 — A Multiple Dosing (14 Days) Study to Assess Efficacy and Safety of Three Dose Levels of AZD7594, Given Once Daily by Inhalation, in Patients With Mild to Moderate Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT00529529 — Safety of Indacaterol in Patients (≥ 12 Years) With Moderate to Severe Persistent Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00667407 — Efficacy and Safety of Levalbuterol Versus Racemic Albuterol in Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00200967 — Asthma Clinical Research Network (ACRN) Trial - Long-Acting Beta Agonist Response by Genotype (LARGE) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00096616 — Combivent® CFC Metered Dose Inhaler (MDI) in Moderate to Severe Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT01302587 — A Study to Evaluate the Integrated Dose Counter on an Albuterol Hydrofluoroalkane (HFA) Metered Dose Inhaler (MDI) (COMPLETED)
  • NCT02794519 — A Phase 2a Study to Evaluate the Effects of Sirukumab in Subjects With Severe Poorly Controlled Asthma (WITHDRAWN) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Dose-Ranging and Cumulative Dose Studies of Albuterol Sulfate MDI in Co-Suspension Delivery™ Technology (AS MDI; PT007) in Patients with Asthma: the ASPEN and ANTORA Trials (Clinical drug investigation, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of heliox- and air-driven nebulized bronchodilator therapy on lung function in patients with asthma (Lung, 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication Prospective, open-label assessment of albuterol sulfate hydrofluoroalkane metered-dose inhaler with new integrated dose counter (Allergy and asthma proceedings, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication The effect of heliox-driven bronchodilator aerosol therapy on pulmonary function tests in patients with asthma (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2002)
  • Clinical trial publication Long-acting beta2-agonist monotherapy vs continued therapy with inhaled corticosteroids in patients with persistent asthma: a randomized controlled trial (JAMA, 2001)
  • Randomized controlled trial Clinical comparability of ventolin formulated with hydrofluoroalkane or conventional chlorofluorocarbon propellants in children with asthma (Archives of pediatrics & adolescent medicine, 2000)

AMINOPHYLLINE Biologic Approved Strong 100
3 trials 11 Cochrane 7 Meta-analysis 156 Trial pubs 98 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00442338 — Study of MK-0476 in Adult Patients With Acute Asthma (0476-334) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT03296579 — Non-invasive Ventilation vs. Standard Therapy for Children Hospitalized With an Acute Exacerbation of Asthma (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT02270827 — A Pilot Study Into Health Pre and Post Treatment With Intravenous Aminophylline and Hydrocortisone in Severe Asthmatics (TERMINATED)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Use of intravenous aminophylline in addition to the standard first-line treatment in children and adolescents with an acute asthma exacerbation: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials (Archives of disease in childhood, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Interventions for escalation of therapy for acute exacerbations of asthma in children: an overview of Cochrane Reviews (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Guideline on management of the acute asthma attack in children by Italian Society of Pediatrics (Italian journal of pediatrics, 2018)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy and side effects of intravenous theophylline in acute asthma: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Drug design, development and therapy, 2018)
  • Cochrane review Intravenous beta(2)-agonists versus intravenous aminophylline for acute asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2012)
  • Meta-analysis Intravenous Bronchodilators in Pediatric Critical Asthma: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Pediatric pulmonology, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Second-line treatment option for children aged 18 years and under with an acute severe asthma exacerbation: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials (Archives of disease in childhood, 2025)
  • Systematic review Use of ketamine in patients with refractory severe asthma exacerbations: systematic review of prospective studies (European journal of clinical pharmacology, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Magnesium sulfate vs aminophylline as a second line of treatment in children with severe acute asthma. Randomized clinical trial (Andes pediatrica : revista Chilena de pediatria, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Randomised comparison of intravenous magnesium sulphate, terbutaline and aminophylline for children with acute severe asthma (Acta paediatrica (Oslo, Norway : 1992), 2014)
  • Clinical trial publication [Clinical efficacies of inhaled corticosteroids plus theophylline in the treatment of bronchial asthma] (Zhonghua yi xue za zhi, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication The efficacy and tolerability of intravenous montelukast in acute asthma exacerbations in Japanese patients (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2012)

BECLOMETHASONE DIPROPIONATE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 18 Cochrane 21 Meta-analysis 541 Trial pubs 388 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT04886999 — Study in Adult Patients With Moderate to Severe Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01345916 — Efficacy of CHF1535 Via NEXT DPI Versus pMDI and BDP DPI100µg on PeakExpiratoryFlow in Asthmatic Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00200967 — Asthma Clinical Research Network (ACRN) Trial - Long-Acting Beta Agonist Response by Genotype (LARGE) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00094016 — Evaluation of Two Doses of QVAR by Breath Operated and Metered Dose Inhalers in Asthmatic Children (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01520688 — Effect of Flovent Discus vs QVAR vs Pulmicort Flexhaler on Short Term Growth (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01141439 — Real-world Effectiveness and Cost-effectiveness of Leading Inhaled Corticosteroids in Asthma Management (COMPLETED)
  • NCT01287351 — Real-world Effectiveness and Cost-effectiveness of Qvar Versus FP, a US Study (COMPLETED)
  • NCT00497237 — Clinical Trial of the Efficacy and Safety of Beclomethasone Dipropionate Plus Formoterol vs Fluticasone Propionate Plus Salmeterol in the 6 Months Step Down Treatment of Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Inhaled corticosteroids in children with persistent asthma: effects on growth (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2014)
  • Cochrane review Omalizumab for asthma in adults and children (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2014)
  • Cochrane review Increased versus stable doses of inhaled corticosteroids for exacerbations of chronic asthma in adults and children (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2010)
  • Cochrane review Increased versus stable doses of inhaled corticosteroids for exacerbations of chronic asthma in adults and children (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2010)
  • Cochrane review Fluticasone versus beclomethasone or budesonide for chronic asthma in adults and children (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2007)
  • Meta-analysis Adrenal suppression by inhaled corticosteroids in patients with asthma: A systematic review and quantitative analysis (Allergy and asthma proceedings, 2016)
  • Systematic review Efficacy and safety of inhaled corticosteroids relative to fluticasone propionate: a systematic review of randomized controlled trials in asthma (Expert review of respiratory medicine, 2017)
  • Systematic review Principal findings of systematic reviews for chronic treatment in childhood asthma (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2015)
  • Clinical trial publication [Efficacy and safety of inhaled salbutamol sulfate combined with beclomethasone dipropionate in children with bronchial asthma: a randomized controlled study] (Zhongguo dang dai er ke za zhi = Chinese journal of contemporary pediatrics, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Improved lung function with beclomethasone/formoterol versus beclomethasone alone in asthma: the FORCE2 study (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Evaluating the impact of changing inhaler color on perception of symptoms and disease burden in patients with asthma: the FEEL study (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Comparison of extrafine beclomethasone dipropionate/formoterol fumarate dry powder inhaler and pressurized metered-dose inhaler in Chinese patients with asthma: the FORTUNE study (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2024)

BUDESONIDE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 57 Cochrane 66 Meta-analysis 910 Trial pubs 793 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT04609904 — Study to Assess PT010 in Adult and Adolescent Participants With Inadequately Controlled Asthma (LOGOS) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00235911 — Symbicort Single Inhaler Therapy for Asthma in a General Practice Setting (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT03788057 — Inflammatory Indices in Predicting the Failure of Inhaled Corticosteroids Reduction in Young Participants With Asthma (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01520688 — Effect of Flovent Discus vs QVAR vs Pulmicort Flexhaler on Short Term Growth (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01444430 — A 6 Month Safety Study Comparing Symbicort With Inhaled Corticosteroid Only in Asthmatic Adults and Adolescents (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT06080945 — Tailored Pharmacist-led Intervention to Improve Adherence to Budesonide (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT00641446 — Varicella Vaccination With Pulmicort (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT03319043 — Observation of Cough Variant Asthma Treated in Combination of Chanqin Granules. (UNKNOWN) PHASE1, PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Adverse events of inhaled corticosteroids in adult patients with asthma or chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: pairwise, network and dose-response meta-analyses (BMJ evidence-based medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety profile of doxofylline in asthma: a meta-analysis (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Single maintenance and reliever therapy in treatment of asthma exacerbations (Annals of allergy, asthma & immunology : official publication of the American College of Allergy, Asthma, & Immunology, 2022)
  • Cochrane review A review of the efficacy and safety of fluticasone propionate/formoterol fixed-dose combination (Expert review of respiratory medicine, 2022)
  • Cochrane review Combination fixed-dose β agonist and steroid inhaler as required for adults or children with mild asthma: a Cochrane systematic review (BMJ evidence-based medicine, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Effect of aerosol inhalation of budesonide on respiratory symptoms and inflammatory factors in patients with asthma: a meta-analysis (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Clinical efficacy of montelukast sodium combination therapy for cough variant asthma in children: A meta-analysis (Pediatric pulmonology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Effect of Montelukast Combined with Budesonide on Inflammatory Response and Pulmonary Function in Children with Cough Variant Asthma: A Meta-analysis (Journal of the College of Physicians and Surgeons--Pakistan : JCPSP, 2023)
  • Systematic review [IS AS NEEDED THERAPY WITH AN INHALED BUDESONIDE/FORMOTEROL COMBINATION ONLY WHEN SYMPTOMATIC AS AN OPTION IN THE MANAGEMENT OF PATIENTS WITH MILD ASTHMA?] (Arerugi = [Allergy], 2025)
  • Systematic review Quantitative comparison of different inhaled corticosteroids in the treatment of asthma in children (Pediatric research, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Budesonide-glycopyrronium-formoterol fumarate dihydrate in uncontrolled asthma (KALOS and LOGOS): twin multicentre, double-blind, double-dummy, parallel-group, randomised, phase 3 trials (The Lancet. Respiratory medicine, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Analysis of risk factors for recurrence in children with asthmatic bronchopneumonia during remission and discussion on the therapeutic effect of diprophylline combined with budesonide (Pakistan journal of pharmaceutical sciences, 2026)

CICLESONIDE Small molecule Approved Strong 100

Registry trials

  • NCT00163371 — Effects of Inhaled Ciclesonide Versus Fluticasone Propionate Versus Placebo on Lower Leg Growth in Prepubertal Children With Mild Persistent Asthma (6 to 12 y) (BY9010/M1-208) (COMPLETED) PHASE3

  • Cochrane review Adverse events of inhaled corticosteroids in adult patients with asthma or chronic obstructive pulmonary disease: pairwise, network and dose-response meta-analyses (BMJ evidence-based medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Stopping long-acting beta2-agonists (LABA) for children with asthma well controlled on LABA and inhaled corticosteroids (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2015)
  • Cochrane review Inhaled corticosteroids in children with persistent asthma: dose-response effects on growth (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2014)
  • Cochrane review Inhaled corticosteroids in children with persistent asthma: effects on growth (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2014)
  • Cochrane review Ciclesonide: long-term treatment of persistent asthma--no clear progress (Prescrire international, 2013)
  • Meta-analysis Inhaled ciclesonide for outpatients with COVID-19: A meta-analysis (Journal of microbiology, immunology, and infection = Wei mian yu gan ran za zhi, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Extrafine Versus Fine Inhaled Corticosteroids in Relation to Asthma Control: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Observational Real-Life Studies (The journal of allergy and clinical immunology. In practice, 2018)
  • Meta-analysis Adrenal suppression by inhaled corticosteroids in patients with asthma: A systematic review and quantitative analysis (Allergy and asthma proceedings, 2016)
  • Systematic review Local and systemic adverse effects of inhaled corticosteroids - Does ciclesonide differ from other inhaled corticosteroids? (Respiratory medicine, 2025)
  • Systematic review Quantitative comparison of different inhaled corticosteroids in the treatment of asthma in children (Pediatric research, 2023)
  • Systematic review Efficacy and safety of inhaled corticosteroids relative to fluticasone propionate: a systematic review of randomized controlled trials in asthma (Expert review of respiratory medicine, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Inhaled ciclesonide does not affect production of antibodies or elimination of virus in patients with COVID-19: Subanalysis of a multicenter, open-label randomized trial (Drug discoveries & therapeutics, 2023)

  • Clinical trial publication Acute bronchial and cardiovascular effects of increasing doses of pirbuterol acetate aerosol in asthma (Annals of allergy, 1982)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review The efficacy of dexamethasone compared to prednisone/prednisolone for the management of pediatric patients with acute exacerbation of asthma: a systematic review and meta-analysis (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Dexamethasone versus prednisone/prednisolone in the management of pediatric patients with acute asthmatic exacerbations: a systematic review and meta-analysis (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2023)
  • Cochrane review Safety of corticosteroids in young children with acute respiratory conditions: a systematic review and meta-analysis (BMJ open, 2019)
  • Cochrane review Intramuscular versus oral corticosteroids to reduce relapses following discharge from the emergency department for acute asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2018)
  • Cochrane review Effects of prednisone on eosinophilic bronchitis in asthma: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Jornal brasileiro de pneumologia : publicacao oficial da Sociedade Brasileira de Pneumologia e Tisilogia, 2014)
  • Meta-analysis Dexamethasone Versus Prednisone or Prednisolone for Acute Pediatric Asthma Exacerbations in the Emergency Department: A Meta-Analysis (Pediatric emergency care, 2021)
  • Meta-analysis Oral steroid-sparing effect of high-dose inhaled corticosteroids in asthma (The European respiratory journal, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Oral corticosteroid reduction and discontinuation in adults with corticosteroid-dependent, severe, uncontrolled asthma treated with tezepelumab (WAYFINDER): a multicentre, single-arm, phase 3b trial (The Lancet. Respiratory medicine, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Modification of asthma treatment efficacy by healthcare access: A reanalysis of AsthmaNet Step-Up Yellow Zone Inhaled Corticosteroids to Prevent Exacerbations (STICS) clinical trial (Respiratory medicine, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication The Glucocorticoid Toxicity Index-Metabolic Domains, an abridged version of the Glucocorticoid Toxicity Index: post-hoc analysis of data from the ADVOCATE trial (The Lancet. Rheumatology, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication As-Needed Use of Short-Acting β(2)-Agonists Alone Versus As-Needed Use of Short-Acting β(2)-Agonists Plus Inhaled Corticosteroids in Pediatric Patients With Mild Intermittent (Step 1) Asthma: A Cost-Effectiveness Analysis (The journal of allergy and clinical immunology. In practice, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Patient Advocates for Low-Income Adults with Moderate to Severe Asthma: A Randomized Clinical Trial (The journal of allergy and clinical immunology. In practice, 2020)

8 trials 2 Cochrane 4 Meta-analysis 44 Trial pubs 41 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT02388373 — A Guideline Approach to Therapy Step-down Utilising Flutiform Change and Step-down (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00529529 — Safety of Indacaterol in Patients (≥ 12 Years) With Moderate to Severe Persistent Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00200967 — Asthma Clinical Research Network (ACRN) Trial - Long-Acting Beta Agonist Response by Genotype (LARGE) (COMPLETED) PHASE3

  • NCT00364442 — Repeat Dose Study of Fluticasone Propionate/Salmeterol Versus Fluticasone Propionate + Salmeterol In Asthmatics (COMPLETED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Inhaled long acting beta agonists for stable chronic asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2003)
  • Cochrane review Regular treatment with long acting beta agonists versus daily regular treatment with short acting beta agonists in adults and children with stable asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2002)
  • Meta-analysis COST-effectiveness of salmeterol/fluticasone propionate combination (Advair(®)) in uncontrolled asthma in Canada (Respiratory medicine, 2014)
  • Meta-analysis Cost-effectiveness of salmeterol xinafoate/fluticasone propionate combination inhaler in chronic asthma (Current medical research and opinion, 2007)
  • Meta-analysis Comparison of inhaled salmeterol and oral zafirlukast in asthmatic patients using concomitant inhaled corticosteroids (MedGenMed : Medscape general medicine, 2001)
  • Systematic review Inhaled corticosteroids or long-acting beta-agonists alone or in fixed-dose combinations in asthma treatment: a systematic review of fluticasone/budesonide and formoterol/salmeterol (Clinical therapeutics, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Once-daily mometasone plus indacaterol versus mometasone or twice-daily fluticasone plus salmeterol in patients with inadequately controlled asthma (PALLADIUM): a randomised, double-blind, triple-dummy, controlled phase 3 study (The Lancet. Respiratory medicine, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication The efficacy and safety of fluticasone/salmeterol compared to fluticasone in children younger than four years of age (Pediatric allergy and immunology : official publication of the European Society of Pediatric Allergy and Immunology, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Video education versus face-to-face education on inhaler technique for patients with well-controlled or partly-controlled asthma: A phase IV, open-label, non-inferiority, multicenter, randomized, controlled trial (PloS one, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacokinetic analysis of inhaled salmeterol in asthma patients: Evidence from two dry powder inhalers (Biopharmaceutics & drug disposition, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication A Randomized Pragmatic Trial of Changing to and Stepping Down Fluticasone/Formoterol in Asthma (The journal of allergy and clinical immunology. In practice, 2017)
  • Randomized controlled trial Clinical Bioequivalence of OT329 SOLIS and ADVAIR DISKUS in Adults with Asthma (Annals of the American Thoracic Society, 2017)

  • Clinical trial publication Predictors of response to tiotropium versus salmeterol in asthmatic adults (The Journal of allergy and clinical immunology, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication Tiotropium bromide step-up therapy for adults with uncontrolled asthma (The New England journal of medicine, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Glycopyrrolate causes prolonged bronchoprotection and bronchodilatation in patients with asthma (Chest, 2005)

1 trials 31 Trial pubs 18 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01733485 — Electrophilic Fatty Acid Derivatives in Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Effect of inhaled indomethacin in asthmatic patients taking high doses of inhaled corticosteroids (The Journal of allergy and clinical immunology, 2000)
  • Clinical trial publication Allergen-induced synthesis of F(2)-isoprostanes in atopic asthmatics. Evidence for oxidant stress (American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine, 1999)
  • Clinical trial publication Different effects of inhaled aspirinlike drugs on allergen-induced early and late asthmatic responses (American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine, 1999)
  • Clinical trial publication Inhibitory effect of indomethacin on tachyphylaxis in response to acetaldehyde-induced bronchoconstriction in patients with asthma (The Journal of allergy and clinical immunology, 1997)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of inhaled frusemide and oral indomethacin on the airway response to hypertonic saline challenge in asthmatic subjects (Thorax, 1997)
  • Randomized controlled trial Effect of inhaled indomethacin on exercise-induced bronchoconstriction in children with asthma (American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine, 1997)

View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01733485 — Electrophilic Fatty Acid Derivatives in Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Effect of inhaled indomethacin in asthmatic patients taking high doses of inhaled corticosteroids (The Journal of allergy and clinical immunology, 2000)
  • Clinical trial publication Allergen-induced synthesis of F(2)-isoprostanes in atopic asthmatics. Evidence for oxidant stress (American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine, 1999)
  • Clinical trial publication Different effects of inhaled aspirinlike drugs on allergen-induced early and late asthmatic responses (American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine, 1999)
  • Clinical trial publication Inhibitory effect of indomethacin on tachyphylaxis in response to acetaldehyde-induced bronchoconstriction in patients with asthma (The Journal of allergy and clinical immunology, 1997)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of inhaled frusemide and oral indomethacin on the airway response to hypertonic saline challenge in asthmatic subjects (Thorax, 1997)
  • Randomized controlled trial Effect of inhaled indomethacin on exercise-induced bronchoconstriction in children with asthma (American journal of respiratory and critical care medicine, 1997)

8 trials 14 Cochrane 15 Meta-analysis 21 Trial pubs 18 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT03021161 — The Effect of Probiotics on Asthma Risk in Animal Laboratory Workers (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT01123252 — Seasonal Allergic Rhinitis Study (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT00490425 — Prevention of Asthma and Allergy by Probiotic Lactobacillus GG (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00159523 — Impact in Off-spring of Mothers After Perinatal Daily Intake of a Probiotic (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT05949255 — Probiotics and Insulin Resistance in Obese Asthmatics (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT00325273 — Prevention Allergic Disease of Infant With Probiotics During Pregnancy and Neonatal Period (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00852124 — Safety of VSL#3 in Adult Asthmatics (TERMINATED) PHASE1, PHASE2
  • NCT01366222 — Food Concentrates Supplementation to Alleviate Asthma in Children (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Gut microbiome dysbiosis in chronic lung disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Probiotics in infants for prevention of allergic disease (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Effect of dietary interventions on markers of type 2 inflammation in asthma: A systematic review (Respiratory medicine, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Effects of Early Diet on the Prevalence of Allergic Disease in Children: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Advances in nutrition (Bethesda, Md.), 2024)
  • Cochrane review Treating asthma patients with probiotics: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Nutricion hospitalaria, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis A Meta-Analysis of Probiotics for the Treatment of Allergic Airway Diseases in Children and Adolescents (American journal of rhinology & allergy, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Synbiotic Bactecal® reduces airway obstruction, sputum eosinophils and IL-4 but increases sputum IL-8 in patients with uncontrolled asthma (Cytokine, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Multistrain Probiotics Supplement Alleviates Asthma Symptoms via Increasing Treg Cells Population: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trial (International archives of allergy and immunology, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication The impact of multistrains of probiotics on Th17-related cytokines in patients with asthma: a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Adjunctive Probiotics Alleviates Asthmatic Symptoms via Modulating the Gut Microbiome and Serum Metabolome (Microbiology spectrum, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication The Impact of Formula Choice for the Management of Pediatric Cow's Milk Allergy on the Occurrence of Other Allergic Manifestations: The Atopic March Cohort Study (The Journal of pediatrics, 2021)
  • Randomized controlled trial Efficacy of Lactobacillus Administration in School-Age Children with Asthma: A Randomized, Placebo-Controlled Trial (Nutrients, 2018)

 Nutraceutical Phase III Moderate 20

View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01432678 — Vitamin D Status in Pediatric Asthma (COMPLETED)
  • NCT00856947 — Vitamin D Supplementation During Pregnancy for Prevention of Asthma in Childhood (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) PHASE1
  • NCT02880930 — Optimizing Vitamin D Status in Children With Wheeze / Asthma (OPTIVIT) (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT03880734 — This Study Include Asthma Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) Overlap Patients.Patients Were Vitamin D Deficient.Age Range 40-70 Years, Smokers.Patients Were Advised to Take Either Placebo or Vitamin D3.Lung Functions and Exercise Tolerance Were Assessed at Baseline and at 26th Weeks. (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT03773809 — Impact of Vitamin D3 Administration on Cardiac Autonomic Tone in Asthma Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease(COPD) Overlap Patients (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT02197702 — Vitamin D in Preschoolers With Viral-induced Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE2, PHASE3
  • NCT01234909 — Asthma, Missed Immunizations, and Vitamin D Deficiency in Atopic Dermatitis (TERMINATED)
  • NCT04179461 — Personalized Treatment Algorithms for Difficult-to-treat Asthma (COMPLETED) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Vitamin D supplementation decrease asthma exacerbations in children: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Annals of medicine, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Vitamin D for the management of asthma (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Prenatal vitamin D supplementation reduces risk of asthma/recurrent wheeze in early childhood: A combined analysis of two randomized controlled trials (PloS one, 2017)
  • Systematic review Nutritional Interventions to Improve Asthma-Related Outcomes through Immunomodulation: A Systematic Review (Nutrients, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Exploratory pilot trial of a multicomponent immunonutritional supplement in children with allergic asthma and rhinitis: The INAPRA study (International immunopharmacology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Does Vitamin D₃ Supplementation Improve Cardiac Autonomic Nerve Function in Vitamin D₃ Deficient Asthma COPD Overlap (ACO) Patients? A Randomized Clinical Trial (Mymensingh medical journal : MMJ, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of age and body mass index on vitamin D level in children with asthma in Riyadh (Scientific reports, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of Monthly Vitamin D Supplementation on Preventing Exacerbations of Asthma or Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease in Older Adults: Post Hoc Analysis of a Randomized Controlled Trial (Nutrients, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of Vitamin D3 Supplementation on Severe Asthma Exacerbations in Children With Asthma and Low Vitamin D Levels: The VDKA Randomized Clinical Trial (JAMA, 2020)
  • Randomized controlled trial Association of serum 25-OH vitamin D₃ with serum IgE and the Pediatric Asthma Severity Score in patients with pediatric asthma (Allergy and asthma proceedings, 2020)

  • Meta-analysis Intravenous Bronchodilators in Pediatric Critical Asthma: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Pediatric pulmonology, 2025)

  • Clinical trial publication The usefulness of the new SOBIstat-F(®) device in children with severe acute asthma attacks in the emergency department: a randomized clinical trial (The Journal of asthma : official journal of the Association for the Care of Asthma, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Intravenous Magnesium: Prompt use for Asthma in Children Treated in the Emergency Department (IMPACT-ED), a pilot randomized trial (Academic emergency medicine : official journal of the Society for Academic Emergency Medicine, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacokinetics and Pharmacodynamics of Intravenous Magnesium Sulfate in Pediatric Acute Asthma Exacerbations (Journal of clinical pharmacology, 2025)
